programme.title: Saint Omer
programme.desc: Rama attends a trial to get material for her new book, but her narrative is derailed as the trial continues. 2022. France. Director: Alice Diop. Starring: Kayije Kagame, Guslagie Malanda.

programme.title: Charmian Clift: Life Burns High
programme.desc: Dive into the novel-like life of Australian writer, Charmian Clift, as we follow her through the events leading to her death. 2024. Australia. Director: Rachel Lane.

programme.title: Midas Man
programme.desc: Behind the man who changed music forever, remains something the world wasn't ready to see. 2024. United Kingdom. Director: Joe Stephenson. Starring: Jacob Fortune-Lloyd, Emily Watson.

programme.title: Fashion Reimagined
programme.desc: Amy Powner, an industry outsider, creates a collection that is ethical, and sustainable. 2022. UK. Director. Becky Hutner.

programme.title: Before What Comes After
programme.desc: Doctor Augustin Masset opens dialogue with writer Fabrice Toussaint about the nuance of life and death. 2025. France. Director: Costa-Garvas. Starring: Denis Podalydes, Kad Merad.

programme.title: Mobile 101
programme.desc: 1/6. The relationship between Katarina and Aki treads uncertain grounds and Jorma gets an interesting job offer. 2022. Finland. Director: Maarit Lalli. Starring: Oona Airola, Martin Bahne.

programme.title: One To One: John & Yoko
programme.desc: See John Lennon and Yoko Onos' charity concert for children with special needs, with mind-blowing remastered audio. 2024. UK. Directors: Kevin Macdonald, Sam Rice-Edwards.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 2/1. Marie Antoinette and Louis embrace modern rule, but enemies lurk everywhere, even in Versailles. 2025. France. Director: Edward Bazalgette. Starring: Emilia Schule.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 2/2. Marie Antoinette's affair with Fersen reignites - could it be part of a carefully orchestrated plot? 2025. France. Director: Edward Bazalgette. Starring: Emilia Schule.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 2/3. The people of Paris openly protest against Marie Antoinette as she protects her unborn child. 2025. France. Director: Edward Bazalgette. Starring: Emilia Schule, Louis Cunningham.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 2/4. Marie Antoinette changes her image, and the King and Queen find happiness when they experience 'ordinary' life. 2025. France. Director: Edward Bazalgette. Starring: Emilia Schule.

programme.desc: Two estranged cousins try to make amends for many generations of family dispute. 2024. Ireland. Director: Chris Cottam. Starring: Colm Meaney, Paul Reiser, Lucianne McEvoy.

programme.desc: 2/5. When Marie Antoinette is implicated in the diamond necklace theft, she is determined to prove her innocence. 2025. France. Director: Raf Reyntjens. Starring: Emilia Schule.
